goal: Compare connector-reported TVL against direct external protocol ground truth for every sub-position.
setup_requirements: fork or mocks for the external protocol
minimal_state: vault owns a position with wallet balance, staked balance, reward balance, and/or NFT/tick exposure
attacker_actions: stake or move part of position into protocol-specific sub-account
call connector TVL and independent ground-truth reads
assertions: connector TVL equals independent ground truth within rounding tolerance
registry remains active while any external exposure remains
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
